Class RiskGameModel

java.lang.Object
Model.RiskGameModel
public class RiskGameModel extends Object
Az MVC architektura Model reszet megvalosíto osztalya.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Szabi

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RiskGameModel()
    The amount of Units left to Place in the Reinforcement Stage of the current Player's current turn.
